seoTitle: Coogee vs Cooladar Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coogee and Cooladar Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coogee vs Cooladar Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coogee and Cooladar Hill.
heading: Coogee vs Cooladar Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coogee, Western Australia and Cooladar Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooladar Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Coogee (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coogee or Cooladar Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coogee has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Cooladar Hill scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coogee scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Cooladar Hill scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coogee or Cooladar Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooladar Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
